top_signals.title: Spyware found on phone of European Parliament member probing it
top_signals.summary: Stelios Kouloglou, formerly a member of the European Parliament's committee investigation abuses of commercial spyware, was twice infected with Pegasus while serving, researchers said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitwise says STRC selloff signals crypto cycle nearing a bottom, not Strategy’s breaking point
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA: Microsoft SharePoint RCE flaw now actively exploited
top_signals.summary: CISA warned on Wednesday that attackers have begun exploiting a high-severity Microsoft SharePoint remote code execution vulnerability patched in May. [...]

top_signals.title: Policy paper: FSCS Annual Report and Accounts and Class Statements 2025/26
top_signals.summary: In its Annual Report and Accounts and Class Statements published today (Thursday 2 July, 2026), the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (FSCS) outlines the vital work it has carried out during the past financial year.

top_signals.title: British Columbia mining hampered by DRIPA ‘confusion’
top_signals.summary: In June, BC’s Supreme Court lifted an injunction that had temporarily restricted construction activities pending resolution of a judicial review.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hudbay gains Peru approval to further increase Constancia mill throughput
top_signals.summary: The new permit increases the Constancia mill's processing capacity from 31 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) to 34 mtpa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, April 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. monthly international trade deficit decreased in April 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit decreased from $56.6 billion in March (revised) to $55.9 billion in April, as exports increased more than imports. The goods deficit decreased $2.4 billion in April to $83.7 billion. The services surplus decreased $1.7 billion in April to $27.8 billion. Full Text

top_signals.title: Boliden in talks to buy Votorantim’s controlling stake in Nexa
top_signals.summary: Nexa is one of the world's leading zinc producers.

top_signals.title: Worse Than an Axis
top_signals.summary: The informal alignment of U.S. adversaries is dangerous.

top_signals.title: Europe Goes Its Own Way
top_signals.summary: Drifting from America, the continent Is rearming and reordering itself.

top_signals.title: Opera rolls out Paste Protect feature to fight ClickFix attacks
top_signals.summary: Opera has introduced Paste Protect, a security feature designed to block ClickFix-style attacks that trick users into executing malicious commands through social engineering. [...]

top_signals.title: Supreme Court decision threatens EU-US data transfer agreement
top_signals.summary: In a Tuesday letter, Max Schrems, the founder of the Vienna-based privacy advocacy organization noyb, told European officials he plans to sue to invalidate the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF) that allows for the transfer of personal data from the EU to U.S. companies.
